column1: # Two maximal OTA app slots for BLE firmware updates.
#   0xFE0000  (128 KB tail unallocated — reserved for future e.g. LittleFS)
# CONFIG_BOOTLOADER_APP_ROLLBACK_ENABLE=y: if a freshly-booted image never
# calls esp_ota_mark_app_valid_cancel_rollback() before the next reset
# bootloader reverts to the previous slot.
